title: Renewable Natural Gas Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content:
North American RNG Production Up 13.7% in Q2 2025 vs Q2 2024 As Regulatory Landscape Evolves

North American RNG production reached an estimatedÂ 33.15 million MMBtu in Q2 2025, upÂ 13.7%Â from Q2 2024's 29.16 million MMBtu. The US contributedÂ 30.21 million MMBtuÂ (91%) while Canada addedÂ 2.95 million MMBtu in Q2 2025. Landfill gas dominates, accounting for 63%of production, followed by agricultural waste at 24% of production in Q2 2025.
author: Aakanksha
